latestWave.status: complete static current-risk final score16 tag-only read-back; validation passed

staticCompletionDefinition.definition: Static binary RE is done when every active static lane for the loaded Steam retail Ghidra database is closed: no unreviewed active static-risk rows remain, no known static-lane evidence gap remains, and subsystem contracts are closed for static purposes with implementation-facing maps, source-parity hypotheses, exact-layout unknowns, patch anchors, and rebuild-risk boundaries explicitly recorded.
staticCompletionDefinition.targetOutcome: The static maps and rebuild-grade static contracts should be concrete enough to serve as a rebuild-grade specification for a clean-room implementation aiming at no noticeable difference from the original game. The static lane must not skip known static evidence, but the actual no-noticeable-difference claim requires later runtime, asset, visual, control, timing, save, and patch-parity proof.
staticCompletionDefinition.activePreRuntimeGate: 1179/1179 current-risk focused rows reviewed or superseded with bounded static evidence
mustRemainTrue: Wave911 retained only as historical-retired/non-reconstructable provenance, not the active completion gate
major subsystem contract maps separate retail static proof, source-parity hypotheses, exact-layout unknowns, runtime-test targets, patch-byte assumptions, and rebuild-parity claims
final static closeout queue/risk refresh finds no unreviewed active focused rows at the current threshold
No active static lane is skipped, waived, or deferred merely because it is hard; remaining unknowns must be explicitly outside static-only proof
outOfScopeForStaticDone: exact concrete runtime layouts unless separately proven
staticCompletionDefinition.scopedException: A single subsystem can move to runtime proof earlier only when its own static contract and patch/static anchors are closed; that is scoped proof, not global static completion.

wave911Focused.note: Historical Wave911 focused denominator from the Wave910 6113-function snapshot. The full 1408 row identities are not reconstructable from present artifacts; preserve 812/1408 as provenance, not as the active completion denominator.

Exact source virtual names, concrete layouts, runtime behavior, gameplay outcomes, BEA patching, and rebuild parity remain separate proof.
